package handler

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_handler_executes_raw_sql_inline
// Rule intent: Handlers that execute literal SQL or repository-unaware raw queries.
func PositiveGinHandlerExecutesRawSqlInline(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var req struct {
		ID string `json:"id" binding:"required"`
	}
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
		return
	}

	var results []struct {
		ID       string `json:"id"`
		Name     string `json:"name"`
		TenantID string `json:"tenant_id"`
	}
	db.Raw("SELECT * FROM items WHERE id = ?", req.ID).Scan(&results)

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"data": results})
}
